title: Vredebest Packaging wins big in Best of Mossel Bay
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you! Winning two...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you! Winning two “Best of Mossel Bay” awards in 2025 - Best Food Distributor and Best Gift & Specialty Store - marks another proud milestone in Vredebest Packaging Mossel Bay’s journey.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Thank you! Winning two “Best of Mossel Bay” awards in 2025 - Best Food Distributor and Best Gift & Specialty Store - marks another proud milestone in Vredebest Packaging Mossel Bay’s journey."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year, we were honoured to be nominated in five categories: Best Toy Store, Best Gift & Specialty Store, Best Convenience Store, Best Food Distributor, and Best Stationery/Art & Crafts Store.","html":"This year, we were honoured to be nominated in five categories: Best Toy Store, Best Gift & Specialty Store, Best Convenience Store, Best Food Distributor, and Best Stationery/Art & Crafts Store."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"These nominations alone reflect the diverse range of products and services we offer to our community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From our early days to where we are now, our journey has been built on more than just products. Guided by our slogan, “More Than Just Packaging”, we’ve committed ourselves to offering quality, reliability, and service that truly make a difference.","html":"From our early days to where we are now, our journey has been built on more than just products. Guided by our slogan, “More Than Just Packaging”, we’ve committed ourselves to offering quality, reliability, and service that truly make a difference."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Our success rests on three pillars - dedication, integrity, and excellence - which shape every decision we make. Just as importantly, it’s driven by the passion and commitment of our incredible team, whose hard work makes recognition like this possible.","html":"Our success rests on three pillars - dedication, integrity, and excellence - which shape every decision we make. Just as importantly, it’s driven by the passion and commitment of our incredible team, whose hard work makes recognition like this possible."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To our customers, your loyalty and support inspire us to keep raising the bar. These awards belong as much to you as they do to us - thank you for making Vredebest Packaging Mossel Bay a part of your lives.","html":"To our customers, your loyalty and support inspire us to keep raising the bar. These awards belong as much to you as they do to us - thank you for making Vredebest Packaging Mossel Bay a part of your lives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“More than just packaging”","html":"“More than just packaging”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"https://www.facebook.com/VredebestPackaging","html":"https://www.facebook.com/VredebestPackaging"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
